name: Standard
title: Ukulele Tuner
description: Free online ukulele tuner. Tune your ukulele to standard G-C-E-A using your microphone.

faq.question: What is standard ukulele tuning?
faq.answer: Standard ukulele tuning is G-C-E-A. The G string is typically tuned higher than the C string (re-entrant tuning).

faq.question: How do I tune a ukulele online?
faq.answer: Allow microphone access, pluck each string, and adjust the tuning peg until the tuner shows the correct note in green.

faq.question: Is this ukulele tuner free?
faq.answer: Yes, EasyTuner is completely free with no ads or registration required.
